title: Applying Subitem Templates to Multiple Items
excerpt: The Subitem template is a great tool for generating a grouping of subitems for reuse. It would be great if the template could be applied to multiple items at one time. In my example, I am applying to subitems to a groupi…

posts.author: PamelaDiane123 (Pamela Schwenk)
posts.cookedHtml: The Subitem template is a great tool for generating a grouping of subitems for reuse. It would be great if the template could be applied to multiple items at one time. In my example, I am applying to subitems to a grouping of 95 course review assignments. It would be a huge time saver if I could select all the review assignments and add the subitem template to each one at the same time versus going into each individual course to apply the template.

posts.author: lizpfahler (Elizabeth Pfahler)
posts.cookedHtml: is it me, or did subitem templates disappear???

posts.author: ConnieMiller (ConnieMiller)
posts.cookedHtml: I hope not. I am using that!

posts.author: lizpfahler (Elizabeth Pfahler)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! How do you add them? I know I experimented when we first got Monday, now I can’t remember where to find them. THanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @lizpfahler,

You can find the subitem template app via our apps marketplace:

If you’ve already installed the app, you should be able to find it via the parent item’s updates section when selecting add view and searching for the app:

Screen Shot 2022-11-16 at 11.29.18 am1210×340 27.6 KB

Screen Shot 2022-11-16 at 11.30.17 am966×638 47.9 KB

Hope this helps!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @PamelaDiane123,

We recommend reaching out to the apps developer team with your request! Their details can be found by selecting the contact developer option in the 3-dot dropdown of the app (in the apps marketplace):

Screen Shot 2022-11-16 at 11.32.31 am876×968 52.1 KB

posts.author: lizpfahler (Elizabeth Pfahler)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you!!! This is exactly what I needed!
